languages.text: {n}Несмотря на внушительное присутствие инквизитора, Себериан не теряет самообладания и подчеркнуто вежливо склоняет голову.{/n} "Приветствую вас, инквизитор. Я слышал, что розетта открывает многие двери, и вот, похоже, пришла очередь моей. Позвольте представить вам верн{mf|ого|ую} {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}слугу моей династии{/d}. Это {name}. Вам же, {name}, представляю лидера наших противников — Диодаса аф Иррамона. Не могу назвать знакомство с ним честью, но решать вам. Дражайший Диодас, давайте покончим с этим поскорее: я отрицаю все ваши обвинения, и мне не в чем перед вами покаяться".

traits.locale_text: {n}Несмотря на внушительное присутствие инквизитора, Себериан не теряет самообладания и подчеркнуто вежливо склоняет голову.{/n} "Приветствую вас, инквизитор. Дражайший Диодас, давайте покончим с этим поскорее: я отрицаю все ваши обвинения, и мне не в чем перед вами покаяться".
traits.speaker: SeberianVonValanciusWithSword

languages.text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."
languages.original_text: {n}Несмотря на внушительное присутствие инквизитора, Себериан не теряет самообладания и подчеркнуто вежливо склоняет голову.{/n} "Приветствую вас, инквизитор. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations and have no cause for repentance."

{n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."

"I had heard, of course, that the rosette opens many doors, but to this extent... Thank you for the honour of meeting me in person, Diodas af Irramon. Our acquaintance promises to be short-lived, but that makes this moment all the more precious. Without your even knowing it, you have reminded me of the importance of strong bonds. Speaking of which... Allow me to introduce you to a friend of the dynasty. {name} will stand beside me in the coming battle. You weren't hoping to hear me repent of the misdeeds you have so readily hung around my neck, were you?"

languages.text: {n}尋問官の威圧的な存在にもかかわらず、セベリアンは堂々とした態度を保ち、礼儀正しく頭を下げる。{/n}「尋問官、ご挨拶。バラの紋章は多くの扉を開くと言われているが、私の扉も例外ではないようですね。この度は、私の王朝に忠実な{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}家臣{/d}{name}を御紹介いたします。{name}、これは敵軍を率いるディオダス・ア・イルラモンです。彼の知り合」
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."

traits.locale_text: {n}尋問官の威圧的な存在にもかかわらず、セベリアンは堂々とした態度を保ち、礼儀正しく頭を下げる。{/n}「尋問官、ご挨拶。バラの紋章は多くの扉を開くと言われているが、私の扉も例外ではないようですね。この度は、私の王朝に忠実な{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}家臣{/d}{name}を御紹介いたします。{name}、これは敵軍を率いるディオダス・ア・イルラモンです。彼の知り合」

languages.text: {n}尽管审判官气势逼人，塞贝里安依旧保持着威严的姿态，带着刻意的礼貌颔首致意。{/n}“审判官，幸会。我早就听说玫瑰结能叩开许多扇门，看来我的门也不例外。请允许我向您介绍，这位是{name}，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}王朝的忠实仆从{/d}。{name}，这位是狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，敌军的统帅。我不觉得认识他是什么荣幸，但你大可以自行判断。尊敬的狄奥达斯，我们尽快了结这事吧：我否认你的所有指控，我也没有什么好忏悔的。”
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."

languages.text: {n}Engizisyoncu'nun heybetli varlığına rağmen Seberian, onurlu duruşunu koruyor ve belirgin bir nezaketle başını eğiyor.{/n} "Selamlar Engizisyoncu. Rozetin pek çok kapıyı açtığını duymuştum, benim kapım da istisna değilmiş. Sizi hanedanımın sadık bir {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}hizmetkârı{/d} olan {name} ile tanıştırayım. {name}, bu Diodas af İrramon, düşman kuvvetlerine liderlik eden kişi. Onunla tanışmayı bir onur olarak adlandırmazdım. Senin nasıl göreceğin ise sana kalmış. Saygıdeğer Diodas, bu meseleye hızlıca bir son verelim: Tüm suçlamalarınızı reddediyorum. Tövbe etmek için bir sebebim yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Onunla tanışmayı bir onur olarak adlandırmazdım. Senin nasıl göreceğin ise sana kalmış. Saygıdeğer Diodas, bu meseleye hızlıca bir son verelim: Tüm suçlamalarınızı reddediyorum. Tövbe etmek için bir sebebim yok."

languages.text: {n}Pese a la formidable presencia del Inquisidor, Seberian mantiene su digno porte e inclina la cabeza con una cortesía cargada de matices.{/n} «Saludos, Inquisidor. Tenía entendido que la roseta abre muchas puertas, y veo que eso incluye la mía. Permítame presentarle a {name}, un{mf||a} fiel {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}sirviente de mi dinastía{/d}. {name}, este es Diodas af Irramon, líder de las fuerzas enemigas. No consideraría un honor el conocerlo, pero dejaré que decida por sí mism{mf|o|a} si lo es. Estimado Diodas, pongamos fin a este asunto de una vez. Niego todas las acusaciones y no he hecho nada de lo que deba arrepentirme».
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pese a la formidable presencia del Inquisidor, Seberian mantiene su digno porte e inclina la cabeza con una cortesía cargada de matices.{/n} «Saludos, Inquisidor. Tenía entendido que la roseta abre muchas puertas, y veo que eso incluye la mía. Permítame presentarle a {name}, un{mf||a} fiel {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}sirviente de mi dinastía{/d}. {name}, este es Diodas af Irramon, líder de las fuerzas enemigas. No consideraría un honor el conocerlo, pero dejaré que decida por sí mism{mf|o|a} si lo es. Estimado Diodas, pongamos fin a este asunto de una vez. Niego todas las acusaciones y no he hecho nada de lo que deba arrepentirme».

languages.text: {n}Malgré l'aura impressionnante de l'Inquisiteur, Seberian garde un port digne et incline la tête dans un salut courtois.{/n} « Salutations, Inquisiteur. J'ai entendu dire que la rosette ouvrait de nombreuses portes, et il semble que la mienne ne fasse pas exception. Permettez-moi de vous présenter {name}, qui {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}sert loyalement ma dynastie{/d}. {name}, voici Diodas af Irramon, qui dirige les troupes ennemies. Je ne dirais pas que c'est un honneur de faire sa connaissance, je vous laisse en décider par vous-même. Cher Diodas, finissons-en sans tarder : je nie toutes vos accusations et je n'ai aucune raison de me repentir. »
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."

traits.locale_text: {n}Malgré l'aura impressionnante de l'Inquisiteur, Seberian garde un port digne et incline la tête dans un salut courtois.{/n} « Salutations, Inquisiteur. J'ai entendu dire que la rosette ouvrait de nombreuses portes, et il semble que la mienne ne fasse pas exception. Permettez-moi de vous présenter {name}, qui {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}sert loyalement ma dynastie{/d}. {name}, voici Diodas af Irramon, qui dirige les troupes ennemies. Je ne dirais pas que c'est un honneur de faire sa connaissance, je vous laisse en décider par vous-même. Cher Diodas, finissons-en sans tarder : je nie toutes vos accusations et je n'ai aucune raison de me repentir. »

languages.text: {n}Trotz der Ehrfurcht gebietenden Präsenz des Inquisitors wahrt Seberian seine Würde und neigt seinen Kopf mit pointierter Höflichkeit.{/n} "Seid gegrüßt, Inquisitor. Ich hatte gehört, dass die Rosette viele Türen öffnet, und offenbar ist meine Tür keine Ausnahme. Erlaubt mir, Euch {name}, einen loyalen {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}Diener meiner Dynastie{/d}. {name} vorzustellen. Das ist Diodas af Irramon, der Anführer der feindlichen Kräfte. Ich würde seine Bekanntschaft nicht als Ehre bezeichnen, aber das könnt Ihr selbst entscheiden. Geschätzter Diaodas, lasst uns diese Angelegenheit rasch beenden: Ich weise alle Eure Vorwürfe zurück und habe keinen Grund, Buße zu tun."
languages.original_text: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. Ich würde seine Bekanntschaft nicht als Ehre bezeichnen, aber das könnt Ihr selbst entscheiden. Geschätzter Diaodas, lasst uns diese Angelegenheit rasch beenden: Ich weise alle Eure Vorwürfe zurück und habe keinen Grund, Buße zu tun."
